summary: Comprehensive testing of mobile responsiveness and PWA features for Graupner Suite. All mobile/responsive features working correctly: desktop sidebar hidden on mobile, bottom tab navigation visible, More menu overlay functional, card-based lists for quotes/invoices on mobile, compact WYSIWYG editor toolbar, quote creation flow on mobile. PWA manifest and service worker present and correctly configured.

design_issues.issue: Made with Emergent badge at bottom of page can overlap with bottom tab bar when scrolled to bottom, though it doesn't completely block functionality as clicks can bypass with force:true

passed_tests: Mobile Login (390x844) - Login with admin/admin123 works, redirects to dashboard
Mobile Layout - Desktop sidebar HIDDEN on mobile (CSS 'hidden lg:flex' working)
Mobile Layout - Mobile top bar VISIBLE with app title and menu button
Mobile Layout - Bottom tab bar shows 5 items: Home, Kunden, Angebote, Rechnungen, Mehr
Mobile More Menu - Clicking 'Mehr' opens overlay with Aufträge, Artikel, Leistungen, Einstellungen, Abmelden
Mobile Quotes Page - Shows card-based list (NOT table) - each quote shows as card with number, customer, date, status, amount, actions
Mobile Invoices Page - Shows card-based list (NOT table) - each invoice shows as card
Mobile WYSIWYG Editor - Compact toolbar (icons only, text labels hidden on mobile)
Mobile WYSIWYG Editor - Voice input and Save buttons present in compact form
Mobile WYSIWYG Editor - Customer select, position inputs, VAT/totals work correctly
Mobile Quote Creation Flow - Select customer, add position with description/quantity/price, save - creates quote successfully
Desktop Layout (1920x800) - Desktop sidebar IS visible with full navigation
Desktop Layout - Mobile bottom nav is HIDDEN
Desktop Quotes Page - Table layout visible (Nr., Kunde, Datum, Betrag, Status, Aktionen columns)
Desktop Invoices Page - Table layout visible
PWA manifest.json - Exists with correct name='Graupner Suite - Tischlerei-Software', display='standalone', icons 192x192 and 512x512
PWA sw.js - Service worker exists and returns HTTP 200
critical_code_review_comments: Responsive CSS patterns properly implemented: 'hidden lg:flex' for desktop sidebar, 'lg:hidden' for mobile nav
Card-based list layout for mobile properly switches from table on breakpoint change
WYSIWYG editor adapts well to mobile with compact toolbar and mobile-friendly position inputs
Minor console warning about <span> inside <option> in select dropdowns - cosmetic but doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test quote A-2026-0006 during mobile quote creation test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness and PWA features fully tested and working. Key breakpoint is 'lg' (1024px) - below shows mobile layout with bottom tabs and card lists, above shows desktop layout with sidebar and tables. Quote creation tested on mobile - all form inputs work. Service worker and manifest.json present. Voice/AI features not tested (require OpenAI API key).
